Chronology of every recorded fact about [[The Reliable]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — The Reliable is a ship commanded by Captain Tommison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — The Reliable is described as looking like a floating, animated conch shell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — The Reliable is a Navigator ship that looks like a giant conch shell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — The Reliable is a ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 10''' — The Reliable is a ship whose crew may be in the tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 10''' — The Reliable is a crew or ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 12''' — The Reliable is a Navigator ship that requires a captain to be sailed far.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — The Reliable is a ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 16''' — The Reliable is a ship.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
